import { deadCodeElimination, generateFromAst, parseAst, stripTypeExports } from "./ast.js"; import { logDiff } from "./logger.js"; import { copyFilesPlugin } from "./copy-files-plugin.js"; import { findReferencedIdentifiers } from "babel-dead-code-elimination"; export { copyFilesPlugin, deadCodeElimination, findReferencedIdentifiers, generateFromAst, logDiff, parseAst, stripTypeExports }; //# sourceMappingURL=index.js.map
